title: April Blood by Lauro Martines - Blogs
highlights: April Blood, historian Lauro Martines tells the story of a plot to assassinate Lorenzo de' Medici, the unofficial ruler of Renaissance Florence. In April 1478, assassins attacked Lorenzo and his younger brother Giuliano as they attended Mass in Florence's cathedral, Santa Maria del Fiore, better known as the Duomo.
